This is somewhere between a pretty bad idea
and a horrible idea.

items.title: how to change default browser on mac
items.content_text: To find out how to change the default browser on a Mac , launch System Preferences, then go to Desktop & Dock (or General for older versions of macOS). Find the Default web browser section, select your desired browser from the list of options, like Safari, Google Chrome, Firefox, and Microsoft Edge, and the new default browser will open all future web links.
